name: custom-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins, opt-in per project.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Academic writing toolkit (Chinese-first): source-grounded drafting that stops fabricated citations, native Chinese drafting via DeepSeek, AI-trace scrubbing, structural humanizer, CJK LaTeX/xeCJK build + visual audit, bibliography authenticity check, locked polish pipeline, and a PKU paper template.

plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: Audit, score, and auto-improve CLAUDE.md files. Forked from claude-plugins-official: the claude-md-improver skill now applies updates directly (no approval prompt) — revert via git if needed.

plugins.name: claude-ai-tutor-kit
plugins.description: Prepare per-section study packets for claude.ai tutored learning sessions. Scoped to Chinese-textbook university courses (scanned PDF textbook + separate aggregated assignment list + chapter/section structure). Three skills: course-exam-distill (one-time exam-paper analysis + per-problem locator index), course-split-section (per-section study-packet assembly, including related past-paper problems), course-init-prompt (drafts Chinese init prompt with direct past-paper references and humanizer-zh pass).
